## 🛠️ Main Aapke PC Par Direct APK Build Kar Raha Hoon!

Cloud dependency (GitHub Actions) ko bypass karke main abhi aapke PC par **Android SDK 34** download karke direct aapki machine par ही **`app-debug.apk`** compile kar raha hoon!

---

### ⏳ Abhi Kya Ho Raha Hai?
1. ✅ **Android SDK Platform 34 & Build Tools** aapke PC pe download aur extract ho rahe hain (`C:\Users\hp\android-sdk`). *(83% Complete)*
2. 🔄 Download hone ke turant baad **Gradle local compilation** start hogi.
3. 🎯 Compilation complete hote hi `app-debug.apk` aapke PC par hi generate ho jayegi!

Bas **1-2 minute ka wait karein** — jaise hi local build finish hoga, main APK ka direct path de dunga! 🚀
